description: A candid color event photograph (no on-image text or graphic overlay) from the Dodger Stadium naturalization ceremony, a tight crowd shot of new citizens in the stands. Numerous attendees wave small handheld American flags; a woman in a blue jacket and sunglasses at center holds a flag aloft and smiles, others record on smartphones, and one man at right wears a gray t-shirt printed with a red U.S. map and the words 'United... of America.' The crowd is diverse in age and dress, some in masks, conveying a festive, emotional celebration. Background shows blurred stadium seating and signage. This is a documentary photo of an official ceremony, not a designed meme or poster. It accompanies the celebratory tweet about 2,100 new U.S. citizens from 120 countries. Intent is positive, patriotic PR around citizenship/naturalization; no agency slogan or designed typography appears on the image. From Aug 2022 (Biden-era).
notable_text: (none designed on image; an attendee's t-shirt reads '...United ... of America'. Tweet celebrates 2,100 new citizens from 120 countries)
